description.value: In pursuit of an equal friendship with their dragon neighbors, many ryphorians have learned to take on their large, winged forms. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Dragon Form] as a 6th-rank primal innate spell once per day. You must transform into the same battle form each time you cast this innate spell, chosen when you select this feat. When you reach 17th level, you can heighten the spell to 8th rank when you cast it.
